## Context

- Explain the context and the reasons behind the changes. Why are these changes necessary?

## Detailed Description

- Technical description of what was done to solve the problem.
- Detail which files were modified and which functions within those files were changed.
    - Explain the outcome of these changes in the code and the reasons that led to this solution.

## Side Effects

- List any parts of the system (that you can recall) that might be affected by the changes.

## Tests Performed

- Describe the tests performed to ensure the changes work as expected.
    - Include information about unit tests, integration tests, and any other relevant tests.
    - Indicate whether manual tests were performed and which scenarios were tested.

## References

- Add links to any relevant tickets, user stories, or other references.
